title: Northrop Grumman's Q1 Bottom-Line Beats Street View; Reaffirms FY22 Guidance
text: Northrop Grumman Corp (NYSE: NOC) reported a first-quarter FY22 sales decline of 4% year-over-year to $8.79 billion, -2% on an organic basis, missing the consensus of $8.88 billion. Sales by segments: Aeronautics Systems $2.7 billion (-10% Y/Y), Defense Systems $1.28 billion (-18% Y/Y),.

title: Northrop Grumman's (NOC) CEO Kathy Warden on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE:NOC ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 28, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Todd Ernst – Treasurer and Vice President, Investor Relations Kathy Warden – Chairman, Chief Executive Officer and President Dave Keffer – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Doug Harned – Bernstein Robert Stallard – Vertical Research Sheila Kahyaoglu – Jefferies Peter Arment – Baird Ron Epstein – Bank of America David Strauss – Barclays Seth Seifman – JPMorgan Kristine Liwag – Morgan Stanley Cai von Rumohr – Cowen Myles Walton – UBS Robert Spingarn – Melius Research George Shapiro – Shapiro Research Richard Safran – Seaport Research Operator Good day, ladies and gentlemen, and welcome to Northrop Grumman's First Quarter 2022 Conference Call. Today's call is being recorded.

title: Northrop Grumman's (NOC) Q1 Earnings Top, Sales Decline Y/Y
text: Northrop Grumman (NOC) reports Q1 sales of $8.80 billion, which miss the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 0.9% and also decrease 4% from the year-ago quarter

title: Northrop Grumman (NOC) Beats Q1 Earnings Estimates
text: Northrop Grumman (NOC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.52% and 0.90%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Northrop Grumman Releases First Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text: FALLS CHURCH, Va., April 28, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) has released its first quarter 2022 financial results. A copy of the earnings release has been furnished in the company's Form 8-K filing and is also available on the company's investor relations website at http://investor.northropgrumman.com.

title: Should You Buy Northrop Grumman (NOC) Ahead of Earnings?
text: Northrop Grumman (NOC) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: Will Soft Segmental Sales Hurt Northrop's (NOC) Q1 Earnings?
text: Northrop Grumman's (NOC) Q1 results are likely to be impacted by lower sales across major business segments. However, earnings might have gained from corporate unallocated and pension adjustments.

title: Inflation Protection And Wealth Generation? Buy Northrop
text: I'm starting this article by explaining my view on inflation, which could be above-average on a long-term basis. Then, I explain why I'm going with a defense company as the best way to protect our wealth against inflation.

title: 3 Legendary Low-Beta Stocks Set to Outperform
text: With the way that the tech sector continues to falter given rising interest rates and persistent inflation, it makes sense to explore safer options in the market more than ever.

title: Why the Earnings Surprise Streak Could Continue for Northrop Grumman (NOC)
text: Northrop Grumman (NOC) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Defense Stocks News: Why Are LMT, RTX, NOC Stocks in the Spotlight Today?
text: Defense stocks are rising today after a new military aid announcement. Here's why the sector's biggest names are primed to keep rising.

title: A Buy, Sell, And Hold In The Defense Sector
text: The defense sector has been resilient in 2022 due to rising geopolitical tensions and several countries increasing investment into the sector.

title: Northrop (NOC) Wins a Deal to Support E-2D Hawkeye Program
text: Northrop (NOC) is going to offer non-recurring engineering, logistics support, obsolescence management, cyber security software support, and technical data for supporting the E-2D Hawkeye aircraft.

title: Northrop Grumman and AT&T Collaborate to Power Next Generation, 5G-enabled Defense Capabilities
text: SAN DIEGO and DALLAS , April 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) and AT&T* entered into a collaboration agreement to research and develop a digital battle network, powered by AT&T 5G and Northrop Grumman's advanced mission systems, to support the U.S. Department of Defense (DoD).   Northrop Grumman and AT&T plan to deliver a cost-effective, scalable, open architecture solution that will help the DoD connect distributed sensors, shooters and data from all domains, terrains and forces – similar to how smart devices connect and share data in our everyday lives.

title: U.S. FY23 DoD Budget Proposal Seeks 4.1% Hike: Stocks to Gain
text: The fiscal 2023 budget requests an all-time high spending provision of $130.1 billion for research and development. Defense stocks like LMT, BA, NOC, GD & HII should benefit

title: Defense Stocks Rose With the Ukraine War. Then a Tight Budget Set Them Back.
text: After a nice run, a fairly tight proposed federal budget for the military hit the stocks. The reasons: Growth in procurement was flat and forecasts showed slowing outlays.That could change.
